name: Russian Honey and Dried Fruit Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. In a small saucepan, heat the honey until it reaches its boiling point. Remove from heat and stir in the spices and baking soda.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream the margarine and beat in the egg yolks one at a time. Beat in the buttermilk until smooth. Add the honey mixture and mix thoroughly, then stir in the dried fruit and nuts.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder and salt. Make a well in the center and pour in the honey mixture. Stir together vigorously until thoroughly combined.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold into the batter. Pour into an oiled 9 by 5 by 3 inch loaf pan.
6. Bake for 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center tests clean. Cool on a rack, then cover tightly with foil to store.
7. Makes 1 loaf.
